body.processed:
Everything you need to know about launching a business in the Riverside area. From permits and licensing to funding sources and mentorship, this guide covers every step of the startup journey.

Step-by-Step Guide

  • Develop your business plan
  • Choose your business structure (LLC, S-Corp, etc.)
  • Register with the state and obtain an EIN
  • Apply for local business licenses and permits
  • Open a business bank account
  • Secure insurance
  • Find your location

Local Resources

  • SCORE Riverside: Free mentoring from experienced business owners
  • Small Business Development Center: Free consulting and workshops
  • Riverside Economic Development Office: Incentives and tax programs
body.summary: Everything you need to know about launching a business in the Riverside area. From permits and licensing to funding sources and mentorship, this guide covers every step of the startup journey.Step-by-

body.processed:
The Riverside Chamber advocates on behalf of the business community at the local, state, and federal levels. Our policy positions are developed through member input and our Government Affairs Committee.

2026 Policy Priorities

  • Infrastructure Investment: Support for broadband expansion and road improvements
  • Workforce Development: Expanded apprenticeship programs and training partnerships
  • Tax Policy: Reasonable tax rates that encourage business investment
  • Regulatory Reform: Streamlined permitting processes for small businesses
  • Downtown Revitalization: Public-private partnerships for economic development

How to Get Involved

Join our Government Affairs Committee or sign up for legislative alerts to stay informed about issues affecting your business.
body.summary: The Riverside Chamber advocates on behalf of the business community at the local, state, and federal levels. Our policy positions are developed through member input and our Government Affairs Committe

body.processed:
As a chamber member, you have access to a variety of marketing tools and opportunities to increase your business visibility in the community.

Member Benefits

  • Business Directory Listing: Prominent placement on our website with 10,000+ monthly visitors
  • Social Media Features: Monthly member spotlights across our social channels
  • Newsletter Inclusion: Submit articles and offers for our bi-weekly newsletter (8,000+ subscribers)
  • Event Sponsorship: Brand visibility at chamber events throughout the year
  • Referral Network: Direct referrals from chamber staff and fellow members

Advertising Opportunities

Website banner ads, newsletter sponsorships, and event program advertising are available at member rates. Contact marketing@riversidechamber.org for pricing.
body.summary: As a chamber member, you have access to a variety of marketing tools and opportunities to increase your business visibility in the community.Member BenefitsBusiness Directory Listing: Prominent placem
